steps.title: Find the gerund subject
steps.content: The subject is the gerund phrase about amplifying Black soldiers' voices and experiences. A gerund phrase acts as one singular noun, even when it contains plural words such as voices, experiences, and soldiers.

steps.title: Use a singular verb
steps.content: A, B, and C are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular gerund subject. The singular verb was fits the sentence. The answer is D.
